risk_description: The generator may accidentally encode a predictable relationship that strategies exploit.
plan_mitigations: negative-control generators; multiple model families; hidden holdout generator; parameter perturbation; real-data paper testing; generator-blind strategy development
required_next_action: Run acceptance-grade negative controls, holdout-generator strategy reruns and real-data paper tests before promotion.

risk_description: The sample day may be unusual.
plan_mitigations: pooled shrinkage; broad stress ranges; explicit uncertainty bands; multiple synthetic normal-day configurations; immediate recalibration with new real days
required_next_action: Collect Class B event-grade multi-day data and rerun Phase 22 recalibration tasks.

risk_description: Execution assumptions may overstate attainable fills and understate adverse selection.
plan_mitigations: pessimistic execution; marketable-order focus initially; latency simulation; partial fills; depth walk; adverse-selection modelling
required_next_action: Run broker/exchange fill provenance, contract-note reconciliation and full lifecycle execution replay.

risk_description: Raw and synthetic L2 data volume may make repeated experiments slow or costly.
plan_mitigations: event-driven generation; integer encoding; Parquet/Zstandard; delta-state representation; separate raw and feature tiers; selected dense tickers; feature-only datasets for repeated experiments
required_next_action: Keep Parquet/Zstandard durable storage and DuckDB query layer; re-estimate before materializing larger horizons.

risk_description: Three synthetic months are a screening laboratory, not a profitability proof.
plan_mitigations: synthetic engineering test; synthetic multi-regime stress test; real-data historical test; live paper trading; shadow execution; very small capital; gradual scale-up
required_next_action: Preserve staged promotion path; do not skip from synthetic screening to capital deployment.
